addons.name: Addon Control Panel
addons.author: DivideByZeroToDeleteWorld
addons.description: In-game add-on control panel for WoW 3.3.5 private servers; includes ZeroMod quick search to filter add-ons by name.

addons.name: ArkInventory
addons.author: Scoots
addons.description: Adds support for attunements.

addons.name: AtlasLoot Mythic
addons.author: imevul
addons.description: Adds mythic items to AtlasLoot.

addons.name: Attune Helper
addons.author: QT, James, Anta, tyrallis
addons.description: Automate your Attunement swaps and manage your gear quickly with this powerful addon.

addons.name: AttuneProgress
addons.author: QT
addons.description: Tracks attunement progress in inventory.

addons.name: ConsolePortLK
addons.author: Sebastian Lindfors, Leandro Araujo
addons.description: Recommended for mobile and controller play; adds gamepad-friendly controls for Wrath clients.

addons.name: Droms Instance Timer
addons.author: Dromkal
addons.description: Tracks how many instances you've entered in the last hour.

addons.name: Droms Kill Counter
addons.author: Dromkal
addons.description: Shows attuneable loot in your current zone.

addons.name: ElvUI
addons.author: QT
addons.description: ElvUI mod for Synastria.

addons.name: cDF
addons.author: QT
addons.description: cDF UI suite for Synastria.

addons.name: Mapster
addons.author: QT
addons.description: Mapster package for Synastria with map quality-of-life additions.

addons.name: MehTrajectory
addons.author: Meh
addons.description: Tracks movement trajectory on the map.

addons.name: Postal
addons.author: Lulleh
addons.description: Postal mod with faster Open All speed.

addons.name: Qt's Auto-Roller
addons.author: Qt
addons.description: Automatically rolls for loot while in a group.

addons.name: Scoots' Combat Attune Watch
addons.author: Scoots
addons.description: Tracks attunement progress in combat.

addons.name: Scoots' Confirmation Skip
addons.author: Scoots
addons.description: This addon will skip the confirmation dialogue when equipping bind-on-equip items, and when looting bind-on-pickup items from chests.

addons.name: Scoots' Craft
addons.author: Scoots
addons.description: This is a complete overhaul of the professions system designed to drastically improve the experience. Comes bundled with a modified Acki's Recipe List

addons.name: Scoots' Quick Auction
addons.author: Scoots
addons.description: Rapidly creates auctions at a specified price.

addons.name: Scoots' Rares
addons.author: Scoots
addons.description: This addon will create a link in chat to automatically run the .findnpc command when near a rare

addons.name: Scoots' Speedrun
addons.author: Scoots
addons.description: Instantly selects dialogue choices in dungeons.

addons.name: Scoots' Stats
addons.author: Scoots
addons.description: This adds a stat panel to the right of your character panel so you don't need to switch between smaller stat panels below your character model, as well as showing a few extra stats

addons.name: Scoots' Vendor
addons.author: Scoots
addons.description: Unified vendor addon that combines filtering and forge workflows.

addons.name: Synastria Build Manager
addons.author: Namira
addons.description: Exports and imports perks and talents.

addons.name: Synastria Tooltip Enhancer
addons.author: Lulleh
addons.description: Enhances Synastria item tooltips.

addons.name: The Journal
addons.author: Qt
addons.description: Dungeon journal with item and boss details.

addons.name: WarpRing
addons.author: Namira
addons.description: Warp Ring UI.

addons.name: OmniInventory Syn
addons.author: RosemyneH
addons.description: Inventory management addon adapted for Synastria.

addons.name: BossTracker
addons.author: nayalist
addons.description: Tracks boss kills and dungeon lockout details.

addons.name: Talented Synastria
addons.author: RosemyneH
addons.description: Talent build manager adapted for Synastria.

addons.name: qtRunner
addons.author: RosemyneH
addons.description: Dungeon runner helper with bindings and run tracking.

addons.name: Questie 3.3.5
addons.author: Netrinil
addons.description: Quest helper for the 3.3.5 client.

addons.name: LizardDMP
addons.author: Versicoloris
addons.description: Fast gear optimizer based on stat priority.

addons.name: LizardKTS
addons.author: Versicoloris
addons.description: Shows Synastria upgrade chains to prevent vendoring.

addons.name: LizardWWG
addons.author: Versicoloris
addons.description: Right-click warps to instantly open their map.

addons.name: LizardSTB
addons.author: Versicoloris
addons.description: Save an action bar and automatically share it across all characters.

addons.name: LizardMMU
addons.author: Versicoloris
addons.description: Pick your favorite mounts and summon one at random with a single click.

addons.name: LizardTMO
addons.author: Versicoloris
addons.description: Store your transmog import codes in-game-no more lost outfits after prestige.

addons.description: Community addon listing from Felbite (3.3.5 catalog page).
